problem id: 72d263a8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(7)

examples:
  11010111 -> 00000001
  01001011 -> 00000000
  11100110 -> 00000001
  10101010 -> 00000001
  11011011 -> 00000001
  00110001 -> 00000000
  01101101 -> 00000000
  10011010 -> 00000001
  00000111 -> 00000000

query: 10101011
predicted answer: 00000001
